unit.note: Full shared/tests/ suite — 2049 passed, 11 skipped, 18 deselected. Two new test files added in this iterate: shared/tests/test_github_api_artifact.py (23 tests covering latest_security_workflow_run, download_security_findings, artifact_max_age_days; happy path, freshness gate, malformed JSON, nested artifact layout, subprocess argv hygiene, real findings_sample.json round-trip) and shared/tests/test_github_triage_artifact_fallback.py (18 tests covering parallel-source emission, auto-resolve symmetry, source-switching transitions, Dependabot-orthogonal cases, untrusted-content escape, length-cap). touches_shared_infra + touches_io_boundary risk flags enforced full-suite run. The pre-existing canon-lint failure on record_event.py:374 (PR #42) was resolved by adding it to ALLOWLIST['compliance'] — it's an enum-value, not a path reference.

integration.note: Integration tests skipped — this iterate only touches shared/scripts/github_api.py + github_triage.py, no cross-plugin integration paths changed. Action-unit schema is unchanged, so existing integration tests against the gh-security key would pass trivially.

e2e.note: No web/Playwright surface — backend producer extension. CLI surface verified below.

surface_verification.runner: uv run --no-project --with pytest pytest shared/tests/test_github_api_artifact.py shared/tests/test_github_triage_artifact_fallback.py shared/tests/test_github_api.py shared/tests/test_github_triage.py shared/tests/test_github_triage_action_units.py --color=no -v
surface_verification.note: F0.5 cli surface — 122 tests covering both new modules + the existing producer test surface. The real-artifact round-trip test (test_real_findings_sample_parses) drives the captured findings_sample.json (35 real findings from run 26192978904) through download_security_findings + verifies the severity/source classification. Source-switching transitions (3 directional cases) ensure dedup-key idempotency holds across artifact ↔ GHAS state changes. Exit 0, single attempt.
